inputs.job_description:
Role Overview:
We are looking for a highly skilled Senior Data Scientist/AI Engineer to lead the development of our next-generation Generative AI platform. The candidate must be an expert in building production-ready NLP pipelines and LLM-based solutions.Key Requirements (Core Evaluation Criteria):Experience: Minimum 4+ years of industry experience in Data Science and Machine Learning.AI/LLM Stack: Advanced proficiency in LangChain, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), and LLM Fine-tuning.Tracing & Monitoring: Hands-on experience using LangSmith for debugging, tracing, and monitoring production pipelines.Engineering Skills: Deep knowledge of Python, ETL pipeline design, FastAPI, and Docker for containerization.Cloud & MLOps: Experience deploying models on AWS (SageMaker) or GCP (Vertex AI).Academic Background: Master’s degree (M.Tech/M.S.) in Data Science, AI, or Computer Science from a reputable institution.

outputs.output:
## Role Overview
- Job Title: Senior Data Scientist/AI Engineer
- Seniority: Senior
- Experience Required: 4+ years

## Core Requirements
- Must-Have Skills: Advanced proficiency in LangChain, RAG, LLM Fine-tuning, Python, ETL pipeline design, FastAPI, Docker, and experience with AWS (SageMaker) or GCP (Vertex AI)
- Nice-to-Have Skills: Not mentioned
- Tools/Platforms: LangChain, RAG, LangSmith, FastAPI, Docker, AWS (SageMaker), GCP (Vertex AI)

## Responsibilities
- Lead the development of a next-generation Generative AI platform
- Build production-ready NLP pipelines
- Develop LLM-based solutions
- Design and deploy ETL pipelines
- Deploy models on cloud platforms (AWS or GCP)
- Use LangSmith for debugging, tracing, and monitoring production pipelines
- Containerize applications using Docker

## Evaluation Priorities
- Advanced proficiency in LangChain, RAG, and LLM Fine-tuning
- Hands-on experience with LangSmith for debugging, tracing, and monitoring
- Deep knowledge of Python, ETL pipeline design, FastAPI, and Docker
- Experience deploying models on AWS (SageMaker) or GCP (Vertex AI)
- Minimum 4+ years of industry experience in Data Science and Machine Learning
